meta.title: Sending Letters To Basic Training
meta.description:
Writing letters to basic training has never been easier with Sandboxx. With Sandboxx, you can send a Letter directly from our app from the palm of your hand, wherever you are. We’ll then print it and deliver it, so your recruit gets your love and support faster.

Sandboxx connects our military community, making service members and their supporters more mission ready than ever before.

Download Sandboxx:
https://link.sandboxx.us/BpXeKJlW96
